info.name: Primary Offerings Admin - SPV Workflow
info.description:
# Primary SPV Offering Workflow

This collection contains workflow for setting up SPVs in the Primary Offering platform.

## Workflow 1: Setting up an SPV
- Find PreIPOCompany (SpaceX)
- Create PreIPOCompanyInvestment
- Create PreIPOCompanySPV
- Grant permissions to Financial Institutions

## Prerequisites
- Valid API key with admin permissions
- Base URL configured for the Primary Admin API

## Variables
- `baseUrl`: Base URL for the Primary Admin API
- `apiKey`: Your API key for authentication

item.name: Workflow 1: Setting up an SPV
item.description:
Complete workflow for creating a new SPV investment in SpaceX, including:
1. Finding the PreIPOCompany ID for SpaceX
2. Creating a PreIPOCompanyInvestment
3. Creating a PreIPOCompanySPV
4. Granting permissions to Financial Institutions

exec: pm.test("SpaceX company found and ID saved", function () {
pm.expect(spaceX, 'SpaceX not found in the results').to.not.be.undefined;

request.description: Retrieves all PreIPOCompanies to find SpaceX and save its ID for subsequent requests.

exec: throw new Error('preIPOCompanyId not set. Please run Step 1 first.');

request.description:
Creates a new PreIPOCompanyInvestment for the SpaceX opportunity.

**Investment Details:**
- Share Type: Preferred
- Share Class: Series N
- Amount to Target: $10,000,000
- Broker Fee: 5%
- Amount Paid to Acquire: $10,500,000
- Number of Shares: 40,000
- Price Per Share: $262.50
- Transaction Type: Secondary
- Enable Layered SPV: FALSE

exec: throw new Error('preIPOCompanyInvestmentId not set. Please run Step 2 first.');

request.description:
Creates a new PreIPOCompanySPV for the SpaceX investment.

**SPV Details:**
- Name: Monark Series SpaceX One LLC
- Asset Type: Private Company
- Exemptions: Rule 506(b), Securities Act Section 3(c)(1)
- Security Type: LP Interests
- Round: Secondary
- SPV Owns Stock: FALSE
- Platform Provider: Monark Markets, Inc
- Trading Symbol: ZSPAX.PVT.PRN
- Tax Form: K-1
- Investor Price Per Share: $250
- Investor Fee Per Share: $12.50
- All In Price Per Share: $262.50
- Total Share Allocation: 50,000 (implied from Total Dollar Allocation / All In Price Per Share)
- Total Number of Seats: 99
- Valuation: $329,810,000,000
- Minimum Commitment Amount: $94,500
- Funding Deadline: 03/31/2025
- Total Dollar Allocation: $9,450,000
- Management Fee: 5%
- Total Commission: $472,500
- Monark Fee Split: 50%
- Partner Commission Split: 50%

item.name: Step 5: Grant SPV Permissions to Financial Institutions

request.description:
Grants access to the newly created SPV for all Financial Institutions under 'Test Partner LLC'.

This ensures that the partner's Financial Institutions can view and interact with the SPV.
